Your tickets. Your split. Each month.

how you want.

$17 / month. Billed monthly. Cancel anytime. 5 tickets from month 1 (up to 8), you allocate them across Gaviom's monthly eligible contest pool any way you like.

Move to tilt · Click to flip

What you get

Everything in Gaviom+

$17/month

$35 in entry value. For $17.

Billed monthly · Cancel anytime

  • ✓5 tickets per month starting month 1
  • ✓+1 bonus ticket every consecutive month subscribed (up to 8 tickets/month)
  • ✓Eligible contest pool announced before billing — you always know what you're entering
  • ✓Split your tickets however you want across pool contests — all on one, spread across five, your call
  • ✓Premium prizes also available to members via standard single purchase

Example splits (5 tickets in month 1)

All on one

5 + 0 + 0

5 tickets on a single pool contest

Spread wide

1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1

1 ticket on five different pool contests

Your mix

3 + 2

Any combination, you decide in your account

Consecutive months · ticket count

Month 15 tickets
Month 26 tickets
Month 37 tickets
Month 4+8 tickets (cap)

Value

5 tickets at $9 each = $45 in entry value for $17/month on month 1 (more tickets in later months at the same price).

Legal

Gaviom designates the eligible contest pool each month and announces included contests before billing. Gaviom may change the pool from month to month. See Official Rules § Gaviom+.
